0.q: Addition of potassium to sltA deletion mutants resulted in decreased levels of sterigmatocystin production. Expression of the sterigmatocystin genes aflR and stcU was strongly reduced in sltA deletion mutant when K+ was added.

1.q: Intracellular glycerol levels in these strains were strongly decreased compared to wild type... these data indicate that gldB is essential for osmotolerance in A. nidulans.

4.q: Transcription factor SltA and the putative pseudokinase/protease signaling protein SltB comprise a regulatory pathway specific to filamentous fungi.

18.q: Only the full-length SltA78kDa form of SltA is detectable in total protein extracts of MAD3693 [null sltB]. This result indicates that SltA proteolysis constitutes the signaling role of SltB.

28.q: EnaA and EnaB have a principal role in adaptation to an alkaline pH environment. But EnaB function seems to be required also for Na+/Li+ adaptation and is crucial for Li+ homeostasis at alkaline pH.
